text: I believe my card has been lost or stolen, as I cannot find it anywhere. Can you help me understand the next steps I should take?
Hey, my card just isn’t going through at all! I thought it was active, but no luck. And I also kind of need it for a big purchase today… What’s up with that?
I can't believe the amount I got charged! It seems like I ended up paying way more than I should have. What happened to my exchange rate?

I was going through my recent transactions and saw a fee charged on my card usage that I wasn't expecting. I always thought that using my card for purchases shouldn't incur extra charges. Could you explain why this fee appeared? I also want to know if there's a way to avoid it in the future, especially since I've been using this card for years without any issues.

I would like to inquire about the status of my new debit card. It was supposed to arrive last week, but I have not received any updates regarding its delivery, even though I have a family event planned soon.

Hey there! I’ve been waiting for my new card to arrive for a while now and I’m just a bit anxious because I’ve got a couple of purchases lined up. Can you let me know when I should expect it? It seems like it’s taking longer than usual, and I’m not sure if there’s something wrong with the delivery. Any updates would really help!

I was checking my recent payments and noticed that the amount charged for my transaction in euros was much higher than I expected. It's like the conversion rate was off or something? Can you help me understand why it turned out that way? Really confused about it!
Hey, so I thought I paid for that thing already, but now I'm not sure. It's like... showing pending? What’s going on?

Hey, I've been trying to use my card but it just doesn't seem to work at all. I mean, I even went to the grocery store earlier, and it just wouldn't scan. It’s kind of weird because I have money available and everything, but the cashier looked at me like I was trying to use a brick instead of a card. Can you check what’s going on? Also, I just got a new phone and was hoping that wouldn't mess anything up!
I’ve been trying to top-up my card for like an hour but it keeps failing. Not sure what’s going on! Could you check if there’s an issue?

Hey there! I've been trying to top up my account for the last half hour, but it keeps saying something's off with my card. Can you check what's going on? It’s super frustrating as I really need to add some funds right now. I can’t recall any issues with my card itself.

Hey there! I was just checking my account and it looks like I have a payment that's pending, but I honestly can't remember what it was for. It’s kinda stressing me out since I need to keep track of my budget, especially with the holidays coming up. Can you help me figure out what’s going on with that? Thanks!
Hey, so I was checking my account, and there’s this payment that just isn’t showing up... like, what’s going on? I thought it was all set.
I was just checking my account and it looks like my card payment is still pending, but I thought it was processed already! What’s going on?
I am experiencing issues with my card as it seems to be blocked. Could you clarify what steps I should take to resolve this situation?
Hey, just checking on when my new card will arrive. It's been a while now.
